custom_message_draft:
Hi Muslim Center Junior High School Team,

I hope you are doing well. I am Maya, and I help with outreach and partnerships at Open Goal Soccer.

I wanted to share something that could be genuinely helpful for some of the families in your school community.

Open Goal Soccer is a proven OPWDD support provider in NYC. We run structured, low-pressure soccer sessions for neurodivergent youth, including autistic children. Each session is designed to create a safe, predictable environment where kids can build movement confidence, practice social interaction, and experience success at their own pace. Families often share that their children leave feeling proud, more connected, and more comfortable returning each week.

Given the student and family support Muslim Center Junior High School provides, this felt like a natural fit to share.

Family Offer: Use code WELCOME10 for 10% off registration. Eligible families may also use OPWDD reimbursement funds.

If there is alignment here, please share our referral details below with your families. Please reach out to us - we would love to hear from you and explore how we can support and partner with your team in more ways.
Website: https://www.opengoalsoccer.com/
Referral contact: ops@opengoalsoccer.com
Promo code for families: WELCOME10

Maya
ops@opengoalsoccer.com

Open Goal Soccer Inc.
www.opengoalsoccer.com
hello@opengoalsoccer.com
(347) 496-6211

Hi Cooke School and Institute Team,

I hope you are doing well. I am Maya, and I help with outreach and partnerships at Open Goal Soccer.

I wanted to share something that could be genuinely helpful for some of the families in your school community.

Open Goal Soccer is a proven OPWDD support provider in NYC. We run structured, low-pressure soccer sessions for neurodivergent youth, including autistic children. Each session is designed to create a safe, predictable environment where kids can build movement confidence, practice social interaction, and experience success at their own pace. Families often share that their children leave feeling proud, more connected, and more comfortable returning each week.

Given the student and family support Cooke School and Institute provides, this felt like a natural fit to share.
